mapper.select: select t_b_tool_main.id as tool_id, t_b_tool_main.name as tool_name, t_b_tool_main.tool_id as tool_tool_id, t_b_tool_main.icon as tool_icon, t_b_tool_main.platform as tool_platform, t_b_tool_main.description as tool_description, t_b_tool_main.base_id as tool_base_id, t_b_tool_main.base_version as tool_base_version, t_b_tool_main.author_id as tool_author_id, t_b_tool_main.ver as tool_ver, t_b_tool_main.keywords as tool_keywords, t_b_tool_main.source_id as tool_source_id, t_b_tool_main.dist_id as tool_dist_id, t_b_tool_main.entry_point as tool_entry_point, t_b_tool_main.publish as tool_publish, t_b_tool_main.review as tool_review, t_b_tool_main.create_time as tool_create_time, t_b_tool_main.update_time as tool_update_time, t_b_tool_main.deleted as tool_deleted, t_b_tool_main.version as tool_version, tsu.id as user_id, tsu.username as user_username, tsui.id as user_info_id, tsui.nickname as user_info_nickname, tsui.avatar as user_info_avatar, tsui.email as user_info_email, tbts.data as tool_source_data, tbts.create_time as tool_source_create_time, tbts.update_time as tool_source_update_time, tbts.deleted as tool_source_deleted, tbts.version as tool_source_version, tbtc.id as tool_category_id, tbtc.name as tool_category_name, tbtc.enable as tool_category_enable, tbtc.create_time as tool_category_create_time, tbtc.update_time as tool_category_update_time, tbtc.deleted as tool_category_deleted, tbtc.version as tool_category_version from t_b_tool_main left join t_s_user as tsu on tsu.deleted = 0 and tsu.id = t_b_tool_main.author_id left join t_s_user_info as tsui on tsui.deleted = 0 and tsui.user_id = t_b_tool_main.author_id left join t_b_tool_data as tbts on tbts.deleted = 0 and tbts.id = t_b_tool_main.source_id left join t_r_tool_main_category as trtmc on trtmc.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_main.id = trtmc.tool_id left join t_b_tool_category as tbtc on tbtc.deleted = 0 and tbtc.enable = 1 and tbtc.id = trtmc.category_id where t_b_tool_main.deleted = 0 and t_b_tool_main.id = #{id}
